title: Durability Bar Entity Health Indicator
description: This is a mod that renders a bar (that looks like Minecraft's tool durability bar), when looking at entities, that displays their health.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

When you look at an Entity, a bar appears, displaying the Entity's health (the bar does slowly change color, based on the Entity's health, like tools' dura bars). Above the bar, there is also some text, that displays the health of the Entity numerically as a percent, or just numbers (like: xx.xx/xx.xxHP). As of **v1.0.1**, the mod can be toggled with this command that the mod adds: **/togglehpdurabar**. Also, as of **v1.0.3** of the mod, the bar and text will still be displayed for 2 seconds, if you look away from an entity (values will be updated).

See this mod's **Gallery Tab**, or play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below for a visual of the mod.
<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2PZ4vRzkVHg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Donation**

If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
